chunks.title: Accusation against the Wicked
chunks.reason: The psalmist addresses the 'gods' and 'sons of men,' describing their inherent unrighteousness and comparing them to a deaf serpent.

chunks.title: Prayer for Divine Judgment
chunks.reason: A series of petitions asking God to shatter the teeth of the wicked and sweep them away like water or thorns.

chunks.title: Conclusion on Vengeance
chunks.reason: The psalm concludes with the righteous rejoicing at God's vengeance and a declaration that God truly judges on earth.
